introSection: Wild Mouse is a pair of steel wild mouse roller coasters located side-by-side at Nagashima Spa Land in Kuwana, Mie, Japan. They are mirror images of each other.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The installation to the left is a standard model while the installation to the right is a mirror image. The statistics in the infobox to the right describe each individual half of the ride.

fullText:
Wild Mouse is a pair of steel wild mouse roller coasters located side-by-side at Nagashima Spa Land in Kuwana, Mie, Japan. They are mirror images of each other.

The installation to the left is a standard model while the installation to the right is a mirror image. The statistics in the infobox to the right describe each individual half of the ride.

Yellow track with green supports.



- Eastern - Western
